title: Flerovium
description: Greatly improve your fps with virtually no side-effects on graphics quality
body:
**1.20.1 Forge Requires Embeddium**

**1.21.1 NeoForge Requires Sodium**

**Client Only Mod**


**Makes Item Rendering 50%+ faster**

**By:**

- Backface culling
- Fast Math
- LOD

**Makes Particle Rendering about 50% faster**

**By:**

- Fast Math
- Fast Culling
- Cache Light

**Makes Entity Rendering about 30% faster**

**By:**

- Fast Math
- Backface culling
